name: FileDelete (archived)
trigger_scenarios: The event is emitted when the configured Sysmon operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: TargetFilename under C:\\Users\\ or C:\\ProgramData\\ combined with ArchiveDirectory C:\\Sysmon provides recoverable evidence of deletion; event 23 archives the deleted file.
Use the initiating image and ProcessGuid to join Event ID 1 command-line context.
Use the timestamp to correlate with related activity.

false_positives: Approved administration, management agents, and deployment tools can generate this telemetry.
Baseline expected hosts, signed binaries, and change windows before suppression.
detection_notes: TargetFilename under C:\\Users\\ or C:\\ProgramData\\ combined with ArchiveDirectory C:\\Sysmon provides recoverable evidence of deletion; event 23 archives the deleted file. This is a T1070.004 Indicator Removal: File Deletion signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the initiating Image, ProcessGuid, and logon context before closing.
kql_snippet:
Sysmon
| where EventID == 23
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Image, ProcessGuid
spl_snippet: index=sysmon EventCode=23 | table _time, host, Image, ProcessGuid
